texto: Twenty-eight years in business and you understand the importance of problem solving and the importance of efficiency, because if you don't become efficient, you don't run a business well, and you are out of business. And I think some of those principles could be applied to leadership in Washington.

texto: There's huge opportunities to continue to improve efficiency in the way the government operates and improve the way government provides services to its citizens.
